name: svelte-starter

scripts.data:sample: npx tsx src/scripts/pipeline.ts src/data/Daten_Werte_Sensoren_sample.csv src/data/rows.sample.json src/data/columns.sample.json && npx tsx src/scripts/mapper.ts src/data/columns.sample.json src/data/charts.sample.json
scripts.data:full: npx tsx src/scripts/pipeline.ts src/data/Daten_Werte_Sensoren.csv src/data/rows.full.json src/data/columns.full.json && npx tsx src/scripts/mapper.ts src/data/columns.full.json src/data/charts.full.json
scripts.data:all: npm run data:sample && npm run data:full

browserslist: > 0.5%, last 4 versions, not ie <= 11, not ie_mob <= 11
